chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1146 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.5903/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 3 3. For order on Misc. No.5904/2025 4. For order on Misc. No.5905/2025 5. For hearing of main case 19.03.2025 Mr. Azhar Habib, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,4&5. Per learned counsel his case is that although no exemption presently available to the petitioner, however, his goods may be released conferring the benefit of the exemption sought. No vested / constitutional right could be demonstrated to seek the relief sought which even otherwise appears contrary to the law. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine.. Judge Judge Amjad
